task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

content.text: I'll create a well-structured 90-minute Q3 kickoff agenda and save it as `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt` right away!

input.content:
================================================================
                  Q3 KICKOFF MEETING AGENDA
================================================================
Duration: 90 Minutes
Format:   In-Person / Virtual
----------------------------------------------------------------

OVERVIEW
--------
The goal of this meeting is to align the team on priorities,
goals, and ways of working heading into Q3. Come prepared to
share updates, ask questions, and commit to the quarter ahead.

================================================================
AGENDA
================================================================

1. WELCOME & MEETING OVERVIEW                        [5 minutes]
   - Introductions (if needed)
   - Meeting goals and what we hope to leave with
   - Quick housekeeping (norms, parking lot, etc.)

----------------------------------------------------------------

2. Q2 RETROSPECTIVE: WHAT WE LEARNED               [15 minutes]
   - Key wins and accomplishments from Q2
   - Missed targets and lessons learned
   - Carry-over items that will affect Q3

----------------------------------------------------------------

3. Q3 STRATEGIC PRIORITIES & GOALS                 [20 minutes]
   - Company/leadership direction for Q3
   - Team OKRs, KPIs, or top-level goals
   - How team priorities ladder up to company objectives
   - Q&A / clarifying questions

----------------------------------------------------------------

4. INITIATIVES, PROJECTS & ROADMAP                 [20 minutes]
   - Overview of key initiatives planned for the quarter
   - Owners, timelines, and milestones for each initiative
   - Dependencies, risks, and blockers to flag early
   - Resource or capacity considerations

----------------------------------------------------------------

5. WAYS OF WORKING & TEAM OPERATING RHYTHM         [10 minutes]
   - Recurring meetings, standups, and check-in cadence
   - Communication norms and tools
   - Any process changes taking effect in Q3

----------------------------------------------------------------

6. OPEN DISCUSSION & ALIGNMENT CHECK               [10 minutes]
   - Open floor: concerns, questions, or ideas
   - Confirm shared understanding of top priorities
   - Surface any unresolved dependencies or blockers

----------------------------------------------------------------

7. WRAP-UP & NEXT STEPS                            [10 minutes]
   - Recap of key decisions made in this meeting
   - Action items: owner + due date for each
   - Where to find follow-up materials (docs, notes, etc.)
   - Confirm next team checkpoint

================================================================
TOTAL TIME: 90 MINUTES
================================================================

PRE-MEETING PREP (Recommended)
-------------------------------
- Review Q2 results and any relevant metrics
- Come with 1–2 priorities or concerns to raise
- Review the Q3 roadmap or planning doc, if shared in advance

POST-MEETING DELIVERABLES
--------------------------
- Meeting notes + decisions log distributed within 24 hours
- Action items logged with owners and due dates
- Q3 goals doc updated and shared with the full team

================================================================

content.text:
The agenda has been saved as `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt`! Here's a summary of how the 90 minutes are structured:

| # | Section | Time |
|---|---------|------|
| 1 | Welcome & Meeting Overview | 5 min |
| 2 | Q2 Retrospective: What We Learned | 15 min |
| 3 | Q3 Strategic Priorities & Goals | 20 min |
| 4 | Initiatives, Projects & Roadmap | 20 min |
| 5 | Ways of Working & Operating Rhythm | 10 min |
| 6 | Open Discussion & Alignment Check | 10 min |
| 7 | Wrap-Up & Next Steps | 10 min |

**A few design decisions worth noting:**
- **Starts with a look back (Q2 retro)** so the team has shared context before diving into Q3.
- **The two biggest blocks** go to goals/OKRs and the roadmap — the most critical alignment topics before a new quarter.
- **Buffer is built in** through the open discussion block, which can absorb overruns from earlier sections.
- **Pre- and post-meeting sections** are included to maximize the value of the time together.

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the timing, add specific agenda items, or tailor the content for your team!
